title: The Best Man Wins
writer: Ben Grauman Kohn, Ethel Hill, Bruce Manning
actors: Edmund Lowe, Jack Holt, Bela Lugosi
plot: A diver saves his best friend's life but loses his own arm in doing so. Later, unable to find work because of his missing arm, he is forced to go to work for a criminal searching for lost treasures. Meanwhile his friend, who has s...
